headlines.title: Spirit Airlines is closing down. Thousands of employees and travelers are impacted.
headlines.description: Spirit Airlines will shut down and liquidate its holdings. With 17,000 employees, it was unable to bear the soaring cost of jet fuel during the Iran war.

headlines.title: After Spirit collapse strands travelers, here's what to know about refunds and rebooking
headlines.description: FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla. — Passengers arriving at Fort Lauderdale-Hollywood International Airport on Saturday were still being dropped off for flights that no longer existed — learning only at curbside that Spirit Airlines had shut down overnight.“I just found out,” Ricardo Tejeda said after stepping off a shuttle

headlines.title: Spirit Airlines could shut down as soon as tomorrow, source says
headlines.description: Spirit Airlines could shut down as soon as tomorrow, a source says, as talks with the Trump administration about a bailout fail to reach a deal

headlines.title: Will 'all-inclusive' packages be the old-school remedy to stop Las Vegas' decline?
headlines.description: Down-on-their luck Las Vegas hotel operators are going all-in on all-inclusive travel packages.

headlines.title: Possible $500M Spirit Airlines bailout by Trump admin fuels warning from experts
headlines.description: The Trump administration is discussing a $500 million rescue deal for Spirit Airlines that could leave the federal government owning up to 90% of the company.

headlines.title: Spirit Airlines nears deal with Trump administration for $500 million rescue package
headlines.description: Spirit Airlines, a discount carrier, has filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy twice in under a year. It's in talks with the Trump administration for a bailout.

headlines.title: Husband arrested after American woman's disappearance in Bahamas
headlines.description: A man who said his wife fell from a boat in the Bahamas has been arrested, his attorney said Thursday, five days after she was reported missing in the Caribbean nation.

headlines.title: American woman missing after husband reports she fell overboard during Bahamas trip
headlines.description: An American woman was swept out to sea after she fell overboard during an evening dinghy trip with her husband off the Bahamas, police said

headlines.title: Republican leaders announce two-track plan to end the DHS shutdown
headlines.description: House and Senate Republican leaders jointly announced a plan Wednesday to end the shutdown of the Department of Homeland Security.

headlines.title: A global jet fuel shortage is raising the cost of air travel
headlines.description: American flyers still smarting from interminable airport security lines are about to get another shock

headlines.title: Body found in Colombia amid search for missing U.S. flight attendant
headlines.description: Colombian officials discovered a body Friday amid the search for a U.S. flight attendant who went missing in the country last weekend

headlines.title: When will TSA lines go back to normal? Travelers may face delays for days or weeks
headlines.description: Travelers frustrated by long security lines may not see immediate relief, even as Transportation Security Administration officers begin receiving pay again on Monday after working without wages for more than a month during the partial government shutdown
